cards.front: What does ∀ mean in the context of quantifiers?
cards.back: For all, it applies to every element in a set

cards.front: What does ∃ mean in the context of quantifiers?
cards.back: There exists, it applies to at least one element in a set
There is an x such that P(x) is true
For all x, P(x) is true

cards.front: What is the meaning of ∃xP(x) ∧ Q(x)?
cards.back: There is an x such that both P(x) and Q(x) are true
